document.purpose: Quick rules & patterns cheat sheet. For full details, READ the referenced docs — DO NOT guess.
read_order: AGENTS.md — Guardrails, CSR rules, code quality
docs/1_ARCHITECTURE.md — System design, data model, invariants
docs/4_DEPLOYMENT.md — Docker topology, env vars, health
docs/7_CURRENT_SETTINGS.json — All current defaults and config

doc_guide.1_ARCHITECTURE.md: Tech stack, data model, CSR, delete policy, AI provider
doc_guide.7_CURRENT_SETTINGS.json: All defaults, env vars, runtime params

must_know.hard_delete_order: registry.delete() → vectors → sections → file → DB row → purge. Sections BEFORE DB row.
must_know.retrieval: Hybrid (dense + Qdrant native BM25 RRF) → rerank (managed via settings.db SQLite → /settings/providers) → full section context to LLM. See 2.2_WORKFLOWS_CHAT.md
must_know.api_gateway: Browser → /api/bep/ → Next.js Route Handler → getToken() → Bearer → backend. Token NEVER exposed to browser.
must_know.provider_boundary: ChatService owns orchestration. OpenAILike (9Router) via llama_index.core.Settings.llm. See 1_ARCHITECTURE.md
must_know.ai_inference: Embedding: switchable via Admin → 'Kết nối AI' (settings.db), default TEI (gte-multilingual-base, 768-dim). Reranker: switchable (TEI/NVIDIA/Cohere) via settings.db. LLM: 9Router (built-in, fixed). RuntimeProviderManager overrides LlamaIndex Settings on activate.
must_know.async_rules: All I/O = async def + await. CPU-bound = asyncio.to_thread(). Celery → asyncio.run() at entry only.
must_know.csr_layers: Route (HTTP) → Service (logic, raises ValueError/RuntimeError) → Repository (SQL, returns dicts). See 1_ARCHITECTURE.md

models.embedding_model: Default: Alibaba-NLP/gte-multilingual-base (768-dim, 32768 ctx, TEI container). Switchable via Admin → Kết nối AI → Embedding tab (settings.db).
models.reranker_model: Default: Alibaba-NLP/gte-multilingual-reranker-base (TEI local). Switchable via Kết nối AI → Reranker tab: TEI / NVIDIA NIM / Cohere.
models.llm: 9Router (decolua/9router:latest, OpenAI-compatible, port 2908) — built-in, fixed. 9Router-side provider mgmt via port 2908 Dashboard.

key_rules.rechunk: POST /documents/{id}/rechunk — if ocr_output.md in S3 → free rechunk (no LlamaParse API call); else → retry parse.
key_rules.single_chunking: SentenceSplitter in LlamaIndex IngestionPipeline only. No double-splitting.
key_rules.text_md_skip: .md/.txt files skip LlamaParse API — parse_from_markdown() directly.
key_rules.history_limit: AI_MAX_HISTORY_MESSAGES=6 (messages sent to LLM per turn)
key_rules.ingestion_chunk_size: ingestion_chunk_size=1200 chars, overlap=150 (config.py). Retrieval chunk_size=600, overlap=120.
key_rules.settings_db: settings.db (SQLite) tại /app/data/settings.db — KHÁC với SQLite của 9Router. Managed via /settings/* API routes.

anti_patterns: direct provider SDK calls in routes
SessionLocal in route files (use Repository via Service)

data_location.chunks: Qdrant → dense + native BM25 sparse vectors, section_id metadata

run_commands.lint: python -m black app --line-length=120 && python -m flake8 app --select=F,E1,E2,E4,E9,W --ignore=E203,E501,W293,W292,W391,W503,W504
